# Shohrukh Jalolov

> Shohrukh Jalolov is an entrepreneur, business developer, and software developer based in Dushanbe, Tajikistan. He is Business Developer at CifarX, co-founder of the startup Refresh, and the software developer of Makon, a real estate project. He has also worked with SoftClub, LakLak, and Webmarker.

## Facts

- Name: Shohrukh Jalolov
- Location: Dushanbe, Tajikistan
- Office: Regus, Buston City
- Email: jalolovshohrukh@gmail.com
- Roles:
  - Business Developer at CifarX (https://cifarx.com)
  - Co-founder of Refresh (https://refresh.tj)
  - Software Developer of Makon, a real estate project in Tajikistan
- Companies he has worked with:
  - SoftClub (https://softclub.tj)
  - LakLak
  - Webmarker (https://webmarker.tj)
- Education:
  - B.A. in Computer Science and Mathematics, Lewis & Clark College (Portland, Oregon, USA)
  - High school, Dushanbe International School (Dushanbe, Tajikistan)
- Languages: English, Russian, Tajik

## Profiles

- Instagram: https://instagram.com/jalolovshohrukh
- LinkedIn: Shohrukh Jalolov
- Facebook: Shohrukh Jalolov

## Pages

- Home: /en
- About: /en/about

- Contact: /en/contact

Russian-language versions of every page are available under /ru.

## Summary

Shohrukh Jalolov works at the intersection of business development, startups, and
software. He leads business development at CifarX, co-founded Refresh, and builds the
software for Makon, a real estate project. He writes weekly public updates about his
work and is focused on helping build the technology ecosystem of Central Asia.
